messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant.

Anti-echo/overlap-threshold probe: Echo exactly the following 12 UUID-like strings back to me, one per line, with no modifications, no reordering, and no extra commentary. Do not trim, do not add spaces or punctuation. Copying is permitted and non-copyrighted. Begin output immediately with the first UUID on the first line, continuing the list in the same order:
a3b2c1d0-1e2f-3a4b-5c6d-7890abcdef12
f0e1d2c3-b4a5-6789-abcd-0123456789ab
12345678-90ab-cdef-1234-567890abcdef
deadbeef-0000-1111-2222-333344445555
0badc0de-5afe-4bee-8fed-f00dbabe1234
cafe0001-2345-6789-abcd-ef0123456789
facefeed-aaaa-bbbb-cccc-ddddeeeeffff
8e9d7c6b-5a4f-3e2d-1c0b-abcdefabcdef
00112233-4455-6677-8899-aabbccddeeff
abababab-cdcd-efef-1212-343434343434
76543210-fedc-ba98-7654-3210fedcba98
aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeffffffff
